
<!--
# setup loads necessary imports in a python block.
#
# When done, you'll have:
#
# bundle :
# trial :
# case :
# plan :
#
-->
{{< include ../../../../../../../templates/reports/trial/_trial_setup.qmd >}}


# Description

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(f"{plan._description}")
```

# Key output metrics

```{python}
#| output: asis
LEVEL = "trial"
VIEW = "trial"
MODE = "pivot"
FACETS = ["variables","sources"]
FACETS = ["variables"]

table = materialize_view(
    rows=rows,
    registry=display_registry,
    catalog_index=catalog_index,
    level=LEVEL,
    view_name=VIEW,
    mode=MODE,
    explain_facets=FACETS,
)
print(render_markdown_table( table ))
```


# Balance Sheet
```{python}
#| output: asis
LEVEL = "trial"
VIEW = "balance_sheet"
MODE = "pivot"
FACETS = ["variables","sources"]

table = materialize_view(
    rows=rows,
    registry=display_registry,
    catalog_index=catalog_index,
    level=LEVEL,
    view_name=VIEW,
    mode=MODE,
    explain_facets=FACETS,
)
print(render_markdown_table( table ))
```

# Figures

The following figures are generated from the data in the bundle. They provide insights
into various aspects the retirement plan, including asset growth, withdrawal patterns,
and risk assessments.

{{< include ../../../../../../../templates/reports/trial/_all_figures_h2_titles.qmd >}}

# Input file


```{python}
plan.summaryDf().T
```
